     the Fermi energy is     3.3416 ev

!    total energy              =   -8183.89867037 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000003 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.23987840 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -191946.66429854 Ry
